Package reciprocal.geometry

Class AbstractCircle<N extends Number,C extends AbstractCircle<N,C>>

java.lang.Object
reciprocal.geometry.AbstractCircle<N,C>
Type Parameters:
N - type of the number
C - type of the circle
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<C>
Direct Known Subclasses:
BigCircle, Circle
@API(status=EXPERIMENTAL, since="0.0.1") public abstract class AbstractCircle<N extends Number,C extends AbstractCircle<N,C>> extends Object implements Comparable<C>, Serializable
Base class for circles
